message:
fix(runtime): harden bulkhead permit tracking and fix cancellable task borrow-checker issue

Bulkhead:
- Upgrade active_permits from BTreeSet to BTreeMap<permit_id, operation_id>
  to enable cross-referencing permit releases against their originating
  operations. Add new PermitOperationMismatch error variant that
  fails-closed when a release provides a mismatched operation_id,
  preventing accidental cross-operation permit confusion.

Cancellable task:
- Fix borrow-checker issue in request_cancel() by cloning phase and
  child_ids upfront before mutating self.tasks. The previous code had
  a shared borrow (reading child state) overlapping with the mutable
  borrow (updating cancel status). Also adopt let-chains for child
  phase matching.

Lane router/scheduler/hardware_planner/obligation_channel:
- Various formatting improvements and minor structural cleanups
  consistent with the runtime module style conventions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
